title: Hummingbird Wellness Studio

Conversation highlights:
- "Founder: 'Need quick triage to reduce admin hours, must...
text:
Inbound via self-serve signup (trial); founder Clara Patel reached out after playing with API keys. Team = 12 (8 admin/clinicians + 4 eng/ops). Primary goal: deploy a front-end triage chat and summarize intake forms into EHR fields.

Conversation highlights:
- "Founder: 'Need quick triage to reduce admin hours, must avoid storing PHI longer than necessary.'"
- They are NOT asking for Private/VPC yet — want hosted API on public cloud but with strong retention controls and audit logs.
- Concerned about HIPAA-adjacent wording: they will not store PHI intentionally but intake sometimes includes identifiers; ask for redaction options and opt-out of persistent logging.
- Latency needs: acceptable to 200-500ms per response; throughput low (peak ~20 concurrent users). Cost-sensitive — early stage.
- Model preferences: prefer open-base models or small Llama2-70B quantized variants; also open t...

title: Lithic Vector Mesh
preview: Account overview: Lithic Vector Mesh is a large commerce platform (catalog + user signals) evaluating a move from in-house FAISS clusters to a managed inference+indexing platform. Primary focus: embeddings + reranking for product search and personalization at massive scale. Target index size in first phase: 100M vec...
text:
Account overview: Lithic Vector Mesh is a large commerce platform (catalog + user signals) evaluating a move from in-house FAISS clusters to a managed inference+indexing platform. Primary focus: embeddings + reranking for product search and personalization at massive scale. Target index size in first phase: 100M vectors, year-2 target 600M-1B vectors.

Requirements summary:
- Throughput: sustained 300-500 qps for product-search queries, 1200 qps batch offline reranks during catalog refresh windows.
- Latency: P50 < 40ms, P95 < 150ms for online search + rerank path (goal: ~50ms end-to-end).
- Cost sensitivity: target unit cost per online query (embedding + ANN + rerank) < $0.0005; must show predictable per-token and per-query economics.
- Model preferences: open/quantized embedding models (in-house fine-tuned on product metadata) + candidate cross-encoder for reranking (can be hosted o...

Initial discovery call (2026-02-12) with CEO (Lina Park) + Eng Lead (Omar Ruiz). Quick notes:
- Use-case: automated ticket summarization + structured extraction (priority, p...
text:
Lead source: inbound via blog post (ticket-summarization + tool-calling). Signed up self-serve trial last week — used Hosted API free credits.

Initial discovery call (2026-02-12) with CEO (Lina Park) + Eng Lead (Omar Ruiz). Quick notes:
- Use-case: automated ticket summarization + structured extraction (priority, product, root_cause) to pre-fill ticket fields and drive triage rules. Also want tool-calling: ability to trigger ticket actions (assign, escalate, add tag) from model output.
- Workload: mostly short tickets (50-300 tokens), 3k–8k msgs/day now, expect 20–30k in 6mo. Latency target: median < 150ms for single-turn summary, 95th < 400ms acceptable. Throughput: bursty (morning spikes). Cost sensitivity: high — SMB budget, wants guidance on batching and prefix caching.
- Model preferences: prefers community/open models; ok with quantized variants. Wants Redwood-hosted variants o...

title: LanternLoop Diagnostics
preview:
- Latency target: 95th percentile < 200ms per token for 32-token responses (prefers <150ms).
- Throughput: bursts to ~200 concurrent short chats; baseline 20–40 rps.
- Cost sensitivity: startup budget; goal <= current OpenAI spend (founder wants numbers).
- Models: open to open models if quality matches; currently u...
text:
- Latency target: 95th percentile < 200ms per token for 32-token responses (prefers <150ms).
- Throughput: bursts to ~200 concurrent short chats; baseline 20–40 rps.
- Cost sensitivity: startup budget; goal <= current OpenAI spend (founder wants numbers).
- Models: open to open models if quality matches; currently using gpt-4o-lite as baseline.
- Routing/fallbacks: want simple fallback to cheaper model on heavy load.
- Compliance: SOC2 mandatory; SSO (SAML) during prod onboarding; audit logs retained 90 days.

title: ClarityMesh
preview:
Background: ClarityMesh is a mid-market SaaS vendor that powers searchable knowledge bases for B2B SaaS customers (support docs, onboarding guides, internal KB). They operate multi-tenant SaaS with a high read volume on KB search and expect peak QPS for search reranking up to ~500 qps across regions.

Primary ask: H...
text:
Background: ClarityMesh is a mid-market SaaS vendor that powers searchable knowledge bases for B2B SaaS customers (support docs, onboarding guides, internal KB). They operate multi-tenant SaaS with a high read volume on KB search and expect peak QPS for search reranking up to ~500 qps across regions.

Primary ask: Hosted embeddings + reranking pipeline. Need low-latency top-K retrieval and a tuned reranker to push relevant KB passages to the assistant. Looking for predictable per-query economics at scale — current internal run-rate on their homegrown vector stack is getting expensive in CPU/GPU ops, want to offload to Redwood if cost/latency wins.

Indexing profile: ~12M total passages today (regularly deduped), incremental ingest cadence: hourly deltas (~10k docs/hr), retention for support docs 3+ years. Currently use 1536-d embeddings, exploring 1024 quantized models for cost. Want ...

title: Ironwood Sentry AI
preview:
Snapshot from AE/SE interactions and security review. POC never started — fell apart during security and resourcing alignment. Key points:
- 2025-11-04 inbound lead via trade show; initial discovery call (Ava Chen + Diego). Company running camera analytics across 12 facilities, wants near-real-time event classificat...
text:
Snapshot from AE/SE interactions and security review. POC never started — fell apart during security and resourcing alignment. Key points:
- 2025-11-04 inbound lead via trade show; initial discovery call (Ava Chen + Diego). Company running camera analytics across 12 facilities, wants near-real-time event classification and operator summarization.
- They insist on private deployment inside their VPC or fully on-prem for 3 'critical' sites. KMS control mandatory; FIPS and export considerations flagged.
- Security sent initial questionnaire (see linked doc). They flagged: no third-party KMS allowed unless HSM integration; 3-year retention + audit export requirements.
- SE calls 2025-12-03 demo + architecture walkthrough. Ironwood liked runtime performance claims but asked for proof of KMS/HSM integration and proof of audit log retention.
- Procurement then announced a company-wide cap on...

title: Mariner Insights Platform
preview:
Account background:

Primary drivers:
- Predictable throughput for peak cha...
text:
Account background:
- Customer since 2023 (started on hosted API for embeddings + reranking). Started POC for Dedicated in Q4-2024 based on seasonal throughput needs. Renewal for hosted contract due 2025-06 but want to fold into Dedicated reserved capacity SOW.

Primary drivers:
- Predictable throughput for peak chartering season (May-Oct).
- Strong need for regional residency (APAC) for some customers and partners.
- Cost predictability: looking to move from per-token hosted spend to committed Dedicated with Optimize to reduce unit costs.

Technical requirements / targets (from SE calls):
- Workload: real-time dispatch suggestions (chat-like), bulk document embeddings/search, post-voyage summarization (batch).
- Latency target: p95 < 300ms for short-turn dispatch queries; tail latency most important.
- Throughput: sustained ~120–250 RPS at peak across multimodel routes.
- Model prefe...

title: HarborLynx Platforms
preview:
Inbound from product org. Pilot on Hosted API completed 2/05 — optimistic on latency, mixed on cost. Product lead (CTO Marco Silva) said: "Hosted latency is fine for user flows but cost/unit is high at 1M tokens/mo scale." Wants move-to-Dedicated analysis. Short bullets: 
- P0: in-app chat + document search in singl...
text:
Inbound from product org. Pilot on Hosted API completed 2/05 — optimistic on latency, mixed on cost. Product lead (CTO Marco Silva) said: "Hosted latency is fine for user flows but cost/unit is high at 1M tokens/mo scale." Wants move-to-Dedicated analysis. Short bullets: 
- P0: in-app chat + document search in single service
- P1: reranking search results for commerce site
- Security: must support company KMS + SAML SSO
- Data residency: US only; some EU later
- Fallback policy desired: hosted -> dedicated -> smaller-quantized on heavy load
